docs.title: baseline
docs.text: All testing, stat values, and balance notes in this guide are based on Level 150 creatures with unboosted stats (no server stat multipliers or custom imprints). Damage and health scaling will vary on boosted servers or higher-level wilds.

docs.title: tier-list
docs.text: T1 Ordinary/Descended | T2 Excellent | T3 Divine/Devilish | T4 Celestial/Abyssal | T5 Warchiefs | T6 Bionic | T7 Wardens | T8 God Trials | T9 Dark Seals | T10 Dream

docs.title: getting-started
docs.text:
Focus on taming Ordinary and Descended creatures, building your Passive Production farm, and preparing for the Excellent Essence Boss (Excellent Dodo).

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

docs.title: T1: Ordinary & Descended
docs.text:
Craft the Descend Smithy first — it's the cornerstone of Ark Descended's progression.

Use it to make Descended Tools (5x harvest rate) and the Tranq Pike, then spec into melee damage to improve knockout power.

Early Gathering Tames:

Miner Anky — 5x resource harvesting, auto-smelts metal

Descended Pelagornis — Best source of organic polymer early on

Logger Castoroides — Harvests tremendous amounts of wood

docs.title: Early Farming & Potion Prep
docs.text:
Get crop plots running early — veggies and kibble ingredients power later crafting. Stock Hunger Potions — they force tames to eat faster.

Ordinary and Descended creatures make up your starting roster. They tame with vanilla foods and vanilla kibble.

Ordinary vs. Descended:

Ordinary dinos — 2x the stats of their normal forms, providing sturdier baseline tames

Descended dinos — Vary in strength and utility, bridging the path to higher tiers

See the Special Taming Mechanics section for creatures that require unique mechanics to tame.

docs.title: Early Production Setup
docs.text:
All Descended dinos passively produce Descended Essence — a key resource throughout progression. Some produce extra resources.

Descended Dodo and Bob (Descended Phiomia) are easy starter producers.

All creatures in T1 (and most everything in T2) use vanilla saddles.

Descended lightpets grant permanent 10% damage boost and 10% damage resistance to your mount (not survivor). This "Critter Bonus" scales across all tiers.

Health Potions can be used both from your hotbar and directly inside your dino's inventory — alternating between the two helps bypass potion cooldowns.

Descended Griffin or Ordinary Snow Owl make great early fliers for scouting.

docs.title: First Boss Prep
docs.text:
Your T1 creatures form the army for the Excellent Essence Boss — the first progression gate.

Descended Phoenix — Strong starter tame with Extraordinary Kibble. Excellent against early bosses.

docs.title: t2-excellent
docs.text: STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

docs.title: Excellent Essence Boss
docs.text:
The Excellent Essence Boss (Excellent Dodo) introduces mid-tier combat and passive production.

Defeating it spawns a tameable Excellent Dodo (passive tame). It produces Excellent Essence and Rare Flowers.

Notable Rewards:

Excellent Essence — Required for crafting Tier 2 and Tier 3 items

Excellent Dodo — Passive producer unlocked after the fight

Excellent Chibi — Grants +100 Stamina and +100 HP regenerated per second for your dino while equipped

Excellent Flak Armor — Durable armor set for Tier 2 exploration and combat

docs.title: Excellent Tier Dinos
docs.text:
Once able, breed and level Excellent creatures heavily. These are your main force for taking on the bosses ahead.

With access to Excellent Kibble, you can now tame a Descended DodoWyvern — a powerful, mobile flier perfect for the T1 Loot Boss and Unreal Boss fights.

Once tamed, your DodoWyvern opens the path to new opportunities: use it to safely tame a Descended Rock Drake, allowing you to obtain your very own Descended Reaper Prince or Princess.

docs.title: Unlocking the War Generator
docs.text: Craft the War Generator with Excellent Essence — it's your boss summoning hub from T3 onward.

docs.title: Combat Bosses — Spider, Gorilla & Dragon
docs.text:
Combat Bosses are empowered versions of vanilla Spider, Gorilla, and Dragon.

Combat Boss Rules:

  • Can only be damaged by Ordinary, Descended, or Excellent dinos
  • Excellent Boss works but does reduced damage
  • Damage scales with your tames' HP, armor, and drag weight — stacking pure tank stats can make them hit harder
  • Defeating any Combat Boss unlocks the Unreal tier

Recommended Strategy: Kill Spider first with Therizino packs (3-4 groups of 6-8) — sustained damage and bleed overwhelm it.

Alternatively, Charge-Adapted Reaper offers safer solo play — ranged acid + energy shield. Keep a light pet active.

Key Drops:

Green Tribute — Spider

Blue Tribute — Gorilla

Red Tribute — Dragon

Combat Loot Box — Combat Essence (from all three bosses)

These tributes and essences are required for summoning and crafting later-tier bosses.

Same strategy for Gorilla — avoid rock throw (30s cooldown). Return to Dragon after Sin of Power; any Unreal Excellent Boss finishes the trio easily.

With Combat Essence, you can now summon a Mek from the War Generator — defeat it to obtain its Mek Blueprint.

docs.title: Unreal Tier — Harnessing the Power of Nightmares
docs.text:
Combat Bosses unlock Unreal Kibble for Unreal Dinos. They have the Unreal Debuff — constant health drain negated by Descended Milk.

Unreal creatures offer:

  • Passive production of Unreal Essence, essential for Excellent Boss Kibble
  • Passive Unreal ability: if enemy attacks miss, they begin to regenerate health

Craft Unreal Armor for your Unreal tames — significantly increases survivability for farming.

You'll need BioToxin for Excellent Tranq Arrows — tame a BioToxin Bug.

The Unreal Megalodon is among the most useful Unreal Dinos — it can swim and fly!

docs.title: Excellent Bosses
docs.text:
Excellent Bosses (start with Indoms or Gigas) use the Torpid Activate system:

  • Can only take torpor once health drops below 50%
  • Every torpor hit triggers a Torpid Activate timer — reapply torpor before it expires or progress resets
  • Once knocked out, you have ~10 seconds to place Excellent Boss Kibble and use a Hunger Potion

Recommended Strategy: Kite into deep water — slows movement and gives room to reposition.

Notable Rewards:

Boss Orbs — Key ingredient for crafting more Excellent Boss Kibble

These creatures become your backbone for tackling the Three Sins and beyond.

docs.title: Unlocking Ghost Forms
docs.text: Evolve select Excellent Bosses into Ghost variants. See Ghost Evolutions for details.

docs.title: The Three Sins
docs.text: Each Sin escalates in difficulty and drops armor upgrades for the next fight.

docs.title: Sin of Unreal (First Sin)
docs.text:
Use an Excellent Boss (Giga recommended). Bring Descended Milk for debuff ticks. Straightforward fight.

Reward: Unlocks the engram for Basic Excellent Boss Armor. Crafting this armor is mandatory for the Sin of Power. Also unlocks Ancient Token Clusters.

docs.title: Preparing for Sin of Power
docs.text:
To craft Advanced Excellent Boss Armor, you'll need an Ancient Token Cluster, which requires defeating all 9 Ancients: Bronto, Giga, Raptor, Stego, Wyvern, Carno, Quetz, Rex, and Trike. If not found wild, summon via War Generator.

Craft your Basic Excellent Boss Armor in the Descend Smithy. Transfer to inventory and find it in your Cosmetic's Tab. Drag the Armor to your dino's costume slot.

docs.title: Sin of Power (Second Sin)
docs.text:
Difficulty spike — grueling even with Advanced Excellent Boss Armor.

Notable Rewards:

Enhanced Excellent Boss Cube engram — Consumed in your Excellent Boss's inventory to permanently transform it into an Unreal Excellent Boss

Ancient Token Clusters and Power Spheres — Needed for crafting higher-tier gear

Once upgraded to Unreal Boss, everything fought up to this point (aside from Combat Bosses) becomes obsolete.

Unreal Buff Effects:

  • Increased passive dodge chance
  • Dodges trigger powerful regeneration

docs.title: Sin of Element (Third Sin)
docs.text:
Requires Unreal Excellent Boss. Less punishing than Sin of Power.

Rewards:

Ancient Token Clusters and Element Sphere

Ghost Cores — Applied to Lightning, Poison, or Flame variants of Wyverns, Drakes, and DodoRexys to transform them into Ghost forms with combined triple-element breath attack

docs.title: The Oracle Boss
docs.text:
The Oracle is the capstone of the Excellent Path.

Summoning Process:

  1. Craft and consume the Oracle Summon in your inventory (not your dino's)
  2. Kill enemies to build experience
  3. At 100,000 XP (check buffs), the Oracle Boss spawns

Fight Overview:

  • Tank-and-spank boss with sustained DPS
  • At intervals, the Oracle summons minions and becomes immune to damage
  • Clear all minions to remove the shield and resume damaging the boss

Strong AoE Excellent Bosses (Giga, Indominus Rex, Ice Titan) excel at wiping minions quickly.

Rewards:

Oracle Essence — Marks the end of Excellent Boss progression

Unlocks T3 kibble — Divine and Devilish Kibble now available

docs.title: t3-divine-devilish
docs.text:
Divine and Devilish creatures mark a new power level.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

docs.title: T3 Progression Paths
docs.text:
Beta Supply Drops — Ancient Token Clusters and resources

The Infected Line — Dimorph → Ptero → Infected Divine Argentavis

Legendary Path — Alpha Dodorexy → Alpha Trex Ascend

See Evolution Paths sections for detailed progression guides: Reaper, Ice Titan, Managarmr, Legendary, Infected, Ancient.

docs.title: Additional T3 Encounters
docs.text:
Artifact Boss — Drops Artifacts used in crafting and War Generator summons

Ascended Poison Drake — T4 battle unlocked at T3, drops soul required for Evolution

Descended Mega Reaper — Summoned via War Generator, required for Reaper Evolution

Wild Alpha DodoRexy — Chance to drop Fertilized Legendary Dodo Egg for passive Legendary Essence production

docs.title: The Divine & Devilish Divide
docs.text:
Farm Divine and Devilish Souls for T3 Kibble and T4 prep.

Divine and Devilish Bosses can also appear as rare wild encounters.

Devilish Phoenix handles both from range with sustained fire damage.

Divine Guardian — Drops Divine Essence

Devilish Guardian — Drops Devilish Essence

Use Divine/Devilish Essence to tame Alpha DodoRexy — a key midgame power jump.

Defeating both Guardians grants:

Advanced Flak Armor — Huge survivability boost

Divine Armor & Devilish Armor — Powerful specialized sets

docs.title: Divine & Devilish Armor
docs.text:
These armor pieces can be equipped onto Divine and Devilish creatures:

100% Melee boost — Stronger defensive scaling

200% Health boost — Enables creatures to withstand damage from wild Abyssals and Celestials

This armor is a key stepping stone — without it, T3 creatures can't damage T4 encounters.

docs.title: t4-celestial-abyssal
docs.text:
STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

Equip T3 armor on your Divine/Devilish creatures to begin T4.

docs.title: Celestial & Abyssal Hunts
docs.text:
Hunt wild Celestials and Abyssals for Souls, Essences, and Hides.

Begin with mid-tier Celestials and Abyssals to safely gather materials before targeting elite versions.

Summon Descended Degenerate Managarmr from War Generator to begin Evolving to Degenerate Form.

docs.title: Celestial & Abyssal Boss Encounters
docs.text:
Summon and defeat seven Celestial Bosses and seven Abyssal Bosses.

Celestial Bosses — Require Divine resources

Abyssal Bosses — Require Devilish resources

Each boss unlocks its Evo Core Engram. Craft with Souls to evolve Excellent Bosses into Celestial/Abyssal forms.

Recommended Strategy: Start with a Devilish Rex, Devilish Phoenix, or Unreal Excellent DodoReaper. Avoid deadly AOE attacks.

T4 forms handle Element Bosses but lack shields.

Abyssal Energy and Celestial Energy Farming: Spawn Abyssal Dodoreaper and Celestial Rock Drake for Energy. Both drop 1 Energy Box to inventory plus 6-12 Boxes from lootbags.

Each boss grants:

Trophies — Used for Warfare Key recipes and advanced summons

Souls — Used in Evo Core recipes and Warfare Keys

All T4 bosses drop Advanced Flak Armor and Large XP Potions.

docs.title: Element Bosses
docs.text:
Celestial Element and Abyssal Element are the final T4 challenges.

Standard Strategy: Army of Abyssal/Celestial creatures with maxed saddles. Abyssal DodoReaper is tankiest.

Saddle Quality Caps:

  • Most T4 saddles cap at 1,000 armor
  • Celestial Golem caps at ~660 armor
  • Celestial Rock Drake Tek Saddle reaches 1,200 armor
  • Ancient Evo Giga reaches 1,200 armor max

Recommended Strategy:

Prep your evolutions first:

Ancient Line: Craft Evo Core: Ancient Evo Spino, then defeat Ancient Phantom for Ancient Descended Gigant Soul + Celestial Gigant Trophies to evolve Spino to Ancient Evo Giga. Next defeat T4 Celestial Gigant to unlock Evo Core: Celestial Giga. Place Ancient Evo Giga near Celestial Giga and select "Sacrifice" to evolve into Celestial Evo Giga.

Infected Line: Craft Evo Core: Infected Divine Argentavis, then defeat Descended Infected Wyvern for Infected Celestial Wyvern's Soul + Trophies to evolve into Infected Celestial Wyvern.

Targeted Boss Counters: Both Descended Infected Wyvern and Ancient Phantom are vulnerable to Purified Evolved dinos.

Element Boss Tactics:

Ancient Evo Giga (Melee) — Circle the boss, avoid AoE attacks. When you see "Run Coward," run! Equip max saddle (1,250 armor ideal).

Infected Celestial Wyvern (Ranged) — Trap the Element boss with pillars or terrain. Bomb from range with Blast ability, weave in fire breaths during cooldown. Expect 2-3 Blast cycles to finish.

Defeating Element Bosses unlocks Shield engrams and Element Essences.

Without Shields, survival in Tier 5 is impossible — they're mandatory for damaging and resisting T5 encounters.

docs.title: t5-warchiefs
docs.text:
Entry into Warchief Trials and the path toward Havoc/Spectral evolution.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

docs.title: T5 Progression Paths
docs.text:
Degenerate Ice Titan — Imbue with Flame or Lightning for siege capability

Deeply Degenerate Managarmr — High-speed burst-damage flier

Alpha Supply Drops — Alpha-tier loot runs

Alpha DodoRexy Evolution — Advance to Alpha T-Rex using Order and Chaos Warchief Souls

docs.title: Eternal Light Armor
docs.text: T5 bosses unlock Eternal Light Armor — higher protection and passive bonuses. Mandatory for Guardians.

docs.title: The Warchiefs of Order and Chaos
docs.text:
Equip T4 Shields (mandatory). Use T4 warfighters or Alpha Tyrannosaurus.

WARNING: The Ancient Evo Giga cannot be used against Warchiefs — it receives a debuff causing it to "cower in fear."

docs.title: Alternative Paths
docs.text:
Primordial Reaper Evolution — Evolve your Alpha King or Queen Reaper into the Primordial Reaper.

Alpha Trex Evolution — Evolve your Alpha DodoRexy into the Alpha Trex.

docs.title: Warchief Battle Tips
docs.text:
• Avoid all AOE warnings displaying "Dangerous Attack Incoming"
  • Maintain distance and apply movement discipline
  • Alternate health potions on hotbar and in dino inventory to overlap cooldowns

docs.title: Order Warchiefs
docs.text: Summoned via War Generator Order tab. Each has a unique Scion taming method.

docs.title: Eternal Warrior
docs.text:
Unique Drop: Challenger's Eternal Banana (auto-added to inventory)

Scion Spawn: Scion of Eternal Warrior spawns on death

Taming Method:

  1. Consume Challenger's Eternal Banana before engaging Scion
  2. Kill Scion — auto-tames at ~10% HP

Rare Reward: Eternal Sword

Abilities: Right Click — Rock throw + lightning sphere barrage | C — Melee-ranged lightning AoE | Ctrl — 30s Eternal King Kong power-up

At low health, avoid DoT-heavy attacks — they can finish the Scion before tame registers.

docs.title: Charger, The Tiger Emperor
docs.text:
Scion Spawn: Scion of Tiger Emperor spawns after death

Taming Method:

  1. Craft Kitty Teaser (Descend Smithy)
  2. Passively feed to Scion — instant tame

Abilities: Right Click — Conal light attack (stronger under Emperor Buff) | C — Light AoE under buff / Conal unbuffed | Ctrl — 60s Emperor power-up

docs.title: Lin, Annihilation Tyrant
docs.text:
Among the most difficult Warchiefs.

Unique Drop: Annihilation Tyrant Crown (added to inventory)

Taming Method:

  1. Kill the Tyrant
  2. Craft Summon Tamed Scion at Descend Smithy using the Crown

Rare Reward: Tyrant Shotgun

Mode Mechanics: The Tyrant cycles between Beta Mode (Lightning) and Alpha Mode (Flame). Beta has weaker damage but wider AoE. Alpha has stronger damage. Rage meter increases attack speed and elemental trigger chance.

docs.title: Chaos Warchiefs
docs.text: Summoned via War Generator Chaos tab.

docs.title: Sariel, The Dying Light
docs.text:
Unique Drop: Challenger's Dying Feather (added to inventory)

Scion Spawn: Scion of Dying Light spawns on death

Taming Method:

  1. Consume Challenger's Dying Feather before engaging Scion
  2. Kill Scion — auto-tames at 10% HP

Rare Reward: Dying Rifle

docs.title: Nidhogg, The Galaxy Warchief
docs.text:
The strongest Warchief.

Preparation: Craft Galaxy Dragon Tribute (Descend Smithy)

Scion Spawn: Scion of Galaxy Dragon spawns on death

Taming Method:

  1. Defeat Galaxy Dragon — Scion spawns
  2. Bring to ~20% HP — lands — passively feed Tribute

Additional Drops: Bionic Essence, Galaxy Essence

Abilities: Right Click — Chaos flame line AoE | C — Ranged multi-orb attack | Ctrl — 35s Galaxy Lightning Bonus

docs.title: Ultimasaurus
docs.text:
Unique Drop: Ultimate Skull (auto-added to inventory)

Taming Method:

  1. Defeat Ultimasaurus
  2. Craft Summon Tamed Scion at Descend Smithy using Skull
  3. Consume to summon tamed Scion

docs.title: Descended Reactor Core
docs.text:
Craft in Descended Smithy using Order and Chaos Warchief souls. Enables Havoc/Spectral spawns.

How It Works:

Activation: Place in mount's inventory and activate. Killing Celestial/Abyssal creatures spawns Havoc/Spectral variants.

Duration: The buff lasts indefinitely but is lost if you cryo the dino.

Cooldown: 600-second reuse cooldown after activation.

docs.title: Havoc & Spectral Resource Farming
docs.text:
Farm Havoc and Spectral creatures for:

Havoc Orbs — For Havoc Kibble and evolution cores

Spectral Elements — For Spectral Kibble and end-tier blueprints

docs.title: Havoc & Spectral Trigger Conversions
docs.text:
Killing certain creatures spawns their Havoc/Spectral variants:

Abyssal Indominus Rex — Spectral/Havoc Indominus Rex

Abyssal Drake — Havoc Drake

Abyssal Dodoreaper — Havoc Dodoreaper

Abyssal Manticore — Spectral Manticore

Abyssal Broodmother — Spectral Broodmother

Celestial Gigant — Havoc Griffin

Celestial Wyvern — Spectral DodoWyvern

Celestial Gorilla — Havoc Rex

Celestial Rock Drake — Spectral Rock Drake

docs.title: The Swamp Master
docs.text:
If you haven't defeated the Combat Dragon, do so now for Red Tributes needed for Havoc Kibble.

Kibble Notes:

  • Havoc Orbs for Havoc Kibble
  • Spectral Element for Spectral Kibble

Unique T5 encounter from War Generator Special tab.

Taming Method:

  1. Defeat Swamp Master — Scion spawns
  2. Knock out Scion (Descended Fabricated Sniper or Advanced Tranq Pike)
  3. Feed Spectral or Havoc Kibble

Abilities: Right Click — Frontal web attack | C — Ranged orb attack | X — Cycle ranged attack when Poison enabled | Ctrl — Swamp Master Power-Up | Radial Menu — Enable/disable Poison Attack (applies devastating torpor)

docs.title: Havoc & Spectral Taming & Progression
docs.text:
Swamp Master's poison attacks deliver high torpor from range — best for knocking out Havoc/Spectral creatures.

WARNING: Even with max saddles, Havoc and Spectral creatures remain extremely vulnerable until they reach Ultimate Form.

docs.title: Havoc Progression to Ultimate Form
docs.text:
How it works:

  • Kill wild Celestial and Abyssal creatures for progression
  • Boss creatures don't count
  • Higher target HP = more progression value
  • Higher your Havoc's HP = more progression required

At 100% progression: Ultimate form with 90% damage reduction and unique Ultimate Attack.

Get a mating pair first. Breed Havocs, then progress offspring to avoid losing originals.

docs.title: Spectral Progression to Ultimate Form
docs.text: Hunt 10 wild creatures of the same Spectral type. Result: Ultimate form with 85% damage reduction.

docs.title: Havoc & Spectral Armor Scaling
docs.text:
Most use upgradeable natural armor instead of saddles:

Armor Stones: Killing wild Havocs/Spectrals with natural armor yields Armor Stones. Each stone fed increases natural armor by +50, up to 800 max.

Saddle Users: Those using saddles drop saddle blueprints instead.

Exception: Havoc Dodoreaper caps at 500 armor.

docs.title: t6-bionic
docs.text:
Bionic Bosses bridge T5 Warchiefs and T7 Wardens.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

Descended Warchief Reactor (Warchief Souls + Havoc Orbs + Spectral Elements) grants "Invincible" with boosted defense.

docs.title: Bionic Bosses
docs.text:
Each Bionic Boss drops:

Bionic Essence — General crafting material

Bionic [Boss] Essence — Unique essence for that creature (e.g., Bionic Giga Essence)

Additional Drops: Bionic Souls, Tek Suits and Components

docs.title: The Bionic Factory
docs.text:
How it Works:

  1. Insert Bionic Boss Essence + ~1,000 Descended Ingots
  2. Start crafting — click Factory every 10% to continue
  3. ~20-30 minutes produces tamed Bionic

Example: Bionic Quetzal Essence + Descended Ingots = tamed Bionic Quetzal

docs.title: Role of T6
docs.text:
Bionics are mechanical siege engines. Havoc/Spectral creatures remain valuable for farming T6.

T7 recipes depend on T6 resources — keep Havoc and Spectral farms active.

Recommended Strategy: Alpha T-Rex with Legendary Raid boost obliterates Bionic Bosses.

docs.title: t7-wardens
docs.text:
Entry into the Warden Trials.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

By the end of T7, two of your mightiest allies can transcend their limits:

Primordial Reaper to Warden Reaper — Tank of near-immortal fortitude

Celestial Evo Giga to Warden Giga — Fusion of celestial and ancient essence

These evolutions require Warden Essences and Legacy items from the Warden Trials.

docs.title: Warden Encounters
docs.text:
Summon Ascended/Descended Little Dodos from War Generator to spawn Wardens (sometimes appear wild). Defeating them grants Warden Essences.

Ascended Wardens:

Warden Rex — Wipe attack + bind mechanic. Rewards: Ascended Warden Essence, Evo Core for Devilish Rex

Warden Spino — Heavy brawler. Rewards: Ascended Warden Essence, Evo Core for Divine Spino

Descended Wardens:

Warden Thorny Dragon — Tank-and-spank. Rewards: Descended Warden Essence, Evo Core for Divine Lizard

Warden Therizino — High melee shred. Rewards: Descended Warden Essence, Evo Core for Devilish Therizino

Use Ultimate Spectrals/Havocs for mobility. Avoid "Dangerous Attacks Incoming!" Bring Descended Milk for tick damage.

docs.title: Warden Chibis
docs.text:
Ascended Warden Chibi — Grants +15% Defense

Descended Warden Chibi — Grants +15% Damage

These bonuses stack with gear and dino stats.

docs.title: Supreme Warden Encounters
docs.text:
Preparation:

  • Bring strongest tames (Ultimate Spectrals, Havocs)
  • Stock up on Descended Milk for tick damage
  • Carry plenty of potions

docs.title: Supreme Warden Reaper
docs.text:
Mechanics: At 0 HP, the Reaper revives powered up with increased damage and larger shield. Second phase is far deadlier — conserve resources.

Notable Rewards:

  • Ascended Warden Essence
  • Supreme Warden Reaper Trophy
  • Supreme Warden Armor Engrams
  • Warden Reaper Legacy (Primordial Reaper Evo)
  • Warden Reaper Intensify Core

docs.title: Supreme Warden Giga
docs.text:
Brute force with massive knockback slam.

Mechanics: Knockback Slam launches survivors and tames. Counterplay: avoid direct engagement and reposition quickly.

Notable Rewards:

  • Descended Warden Essence
  • Supreme Warden Giga Trophy
  • Supreme Warden Armor Engrams
  • Warden Giga Legacy (Ancient Evo Giga Evo)
  • Warden Giga Intensify Core

docs.title: Supreme Warden Strategy
docs.text:
The Supreme Warden Giga is the strongest opponent to this point. Defeat the Supreme Warden Reaper first to evolve your Primordial Reaper into a Warden Reaper.

Then use your Warden Reaper against the Supreme Warden Giga — but trap it strategically using indestructible structures or terrain to block knockback arcs while leaving attack openings.

Both Supreme Wardens punish tanking. Victory requires mobility, timing, and Descended Milk.

docs.title: t8-god-trials
docs.text:
Challenge the gods using opposite-path Warchiefs.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

docs.title: T8 Evolution Paths
docs.text:
Warden Reaper to Supreme Warden Reaper — Unmatched durability and rapid regeneration

Warden Giga to Supreme Warden Giga — Pinnacle of raw strength

Alpha T-Rex to Supreme Alpha T-Rex — Unparalleled burst damage and AoE roar scaling

docs.title: God Trial Requirements
docs.text:
To defeat T8 Gods (Dream, Ascension God / Empty, Descension God), you must have the correct Warchief of the opposite path within scan radius:

Ascension God (Dream) — Requires a Chaos Warchief nearby

Descension God (Empty) — Requires an Order Warchief nearby

docs.title: Ascension/Descension Boss Mechanics
docs.text:
1. Scan Phase: God spawns and scans your Warchief
  2. Round 1: Summons 1 minion clone of your Warchief (functions like T5 boss but stronger)
  3. Round 2: Scans again, summons 2 clones
  4. Round 3: Scans again, summons 3 clones
  5. Completion: All clones defeated, God is slain

Killing clones deals damage directly to the God.

Rewards:

  • Soul of the Ascension God (Dream)
  • Soul of the Descension God (Empty)

docs.title: Player Tips
docs.text:
• Use strongest tames — clones are tougher than standard T5 bosses
  • Focus entirely on clones, not the God
  • Keep Warchief within range but avoid aggro
  • Do NOT level up your Warchief before fighting — clone power scales with Warchief level and stats
  • Warchief Reactor boosts also carry over to clones

Keep your Warchief un-leveled until after defeating the T8 Boss.

docs.title: Recommended Strategy
docs.text:
1. Choose your Scion (Tiger Emperor or Dying Light recommended)
  2. Use Warden Reaper or Warden Giga to defeat all three clone waves while keeping maximum distance from the God and Scion
  3. After victory, Descend your Tiger Emperor or Ascend your Dying Light
  4. Use the Essence to evolve your Warden into Supreme Warden form
  5. Supreme Warden becomes your powerhouse for all remaining battles

The Tyrant Spino is deadliest due to DoT and knockback. Equip Ascended Chibi for 15% damage resistance.

docs.title: Ascend / Descend Your Warchief
docs.text: Once you've collected essences, Ascend or Descend your Warchief by sacrificing the appropriate Warden or Bionic. Your Warchief will have a buff after the boss fight — do not cryo or you lose it.

docs.title: Evolving a Warden
docs.text:
Defeating each Warden Boss unlocks its Warden Evolution Core.

Warden Rex — Evo Core feeds to Devilish Rex

Warden Spino — Evo Core feeds to Divine Spino

Warden Thorny Dragon — Evo Core feeds to Divine Thorny Dragon

Warden Therizino — Evo Core feeds to Devilish Therizino

docs.title: Warchief Ascension/Descension
docs.text:
From this point forward, potions will no longer heal your creatures. Your only reliable healing comes from Ascended or Descended Warchief Essences.

Ascension Warchiefs:

  • Dying Light requires Warden Rex
  • Galaxy requires Warden Spino
  • Ultimate Carcha requires Bionic Giga

Descension Warchiefs:

  • Eternal Warrior requires Warden Therizino
  • Tiger Emperor requires Warden Thorny Dragon
  • Tyrant Spino requires Bionic Giga

docs.title: Ascended & Descended Warchief Essences
docs.text:
Every Ascend or Descend grants one corresponding Essence. These are permanent crafting materials not consumed when used — except during final boss evolution.

Essence Healing Effect: Place in hotbar or creature inventory. Instantly heals 80% HP and Stamina. Ascended Essence only heals Ascended creatures; Descended only heals Descended.

Ascension is based on total level — spend all unassigned skill points before ascending.

docs.title: t9-dark-seals
docs.text:
Three Seal boss fights grant fragments to craft the Dark Altar Summon Cube.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

Any two of the three fragments combine to craft the Cube.

docs.title: Dubhe, Seal of Blaze
docs.text:
Battle Type: Tank 'n Spank

Straightforward fight focused on sustained damage and survivability. Minimal mechanics.

Reward: Blaze Fragment

docs.title: DiTsugo, Seal of Void
docs.text:
Battle Type: Shield Phase Mechanic

The boss periodically raises a shield, becoming immobile but invulnerable. When you see "Void Aura," put distance to avoid being sucked in. To break the shield, manually destroy it with a weapon.

Recommended: Tyrant Shotgun or similar high-burst firearm. If you can't fire safely from mount, dismount at range, shoot shield, remount quickly — Void Seal charges immediately once shield drops.

Reward: Void Fragment

docs.title: Nephus, Seal of Air
docs.text:
Battle Type: Aerial Engagement

Starts high in the sky and won't initiate combat until damaged. Use a mount with jump or ranged attacks. Straightforward once engaged but includes a bleed attack — bring milk to sustain.

Reward: Air Fragment

Recommended Strategy: Use Supreme Warden Reaper for all three Seals — durability, mobility, and regeneration make it ideal. Otherwise use strongest T8 Ascended or Descended dinos with Descended Milk and potions.

docs.title: Crafting the Dark Altar Summon Cube
docs.text: After obtaining any two Seal Fragments, craft the Dark Altar Summon Cube in the Descended War Generator. Use it to summon one of the T9 God Beasts.

docs.title: The Beasts
docs.text: Summoned via Dark Altar Ritual. Can only be damaged at night.

docs.title: Priming the Dark Altar
docs.text:
Before summoning, prime your Dark Altar by loading a Dark Altar Summon Cube and performing seven sequential sacrifices:

  1. Excellent Dino
  2. Unreal Dino
  3. Divine Dino
  4. Devilish Dino
  5. Abyssal Dino
  6. Celestial Dino
  7. Bionic Dino

Once complete, place the appropriate Warchief nearby:

Dying Light — Summons Beast of Darkness

Eternal Gorilla — Summons Beast of Oblivion

Galaxy Warchief — Summons Beast of Desperation

All sacrifices and summoning must occur at night. The altar must remain in view during the ritual.

docs.title: The Battle for Beasts
docs.text:
Bring your strongest T8 creature — Supreme Warden Reaper remains top-tier.

To Tame: Consume a Challenger's Feather (Dying Light) or Challenger's Eternal Banana (Eternal Gorilla) before engaging. Fight until ~10 HP — auto-tames.

To Defeat: Engage directly with overwhelming DPS.

docs.title: Beast of Darkness
docs.text:
Summoned By: Dying Light

Taming Method: Consume Challenger's Feather; auto-tames at 10% HP

Strategy: Performs devastating special attack on 60-second timer. Watch for red glowing orb at center — Dark Core Surge. Hits during channeling increase Dark Multiplier (up to x10). Stop attacking and back away when orb glows. Burst explosion scales with multiplier and can wipe top-tier mounts.

Drops: Darkness Loot Box containing Fragment of Darkness

docs.title: Beast of Oblivion
docs.text:
Summoned By: Eternal Gorilla

Taming Method: Consume Challenger's Eternal Banana; auto-tames at 10% HP

Strategy: Watch for "Warning" prompt — signals special tail jab on 60-second timer. If it connects, drains HP, heals itself massively, and gains heavy shield. Dodge immediately when warning appears.

Drops: Oblivion Loot Box containing Fragment of Oblivion

docs.title: Beast of Desperation
docs.text:
Summoned By: Galaxy Warchief

A massive flying boss with extreme durability and high evasion. Auto-tames upon defeat. Significantly longer fight due to mobility and immense health.

Strategy: Long tank 'n spank battle.

Drops: Fragment of Desperation

docs.title: Degenerate of Darkness
docs.text:
Seal Type: Fourth and Final Seal (Not tamable)

Strategy: Towering boss with immense HP and one-shot fireball mechanic. A massive fireball appears above its head for 30 seconds — when 5-10 seconds remain, retreat immediately. The Degenerate roars and erupts, instantly killing anything within aura. Re-engage after blast subsides.

Drops: Fragment of Desperation, Degenerate Seal Armor (equip to Beast for enhanced defense)

docs.title: Key Mechanics & Challenges
docs.text:
• Fight only at night — daylight cancels the challenge
  • Bosses periodically heal for 30M+ HP
  • If multiple tames present, difficulty scales and targeting can glitch

Always initiate at nighttime. Use open terrain. Expect extended engagements.

docs.title: t10-dream
docs.text:
The final boss encounter.

STRUCTURE DAMAGE: N/A

docs.title: Encounter Mechanics
docs.text:
Corrupt Waves: Spawn every 6 minutes, each wave grows stronger

Cloned Minions: Appear roughly every 5 minutes, replicating your tames' strength and resistances

Wipeout Ability: Dream uses a devastating full-area purge twice per fight — once at 60% HP and again at 20% HP. Survivors and tames caught unprepared will be annihilated.

Seal Phases:

Untamable Phase: Standard mechanics with environmental hazards and wipe attacks

Tamable Phase: Triggered post-victory in special arenas, allowing capture of Dream's essence for unique evolutions

docs.title: Recommended Strategy
docs.text:
• Beast of Darkness is most effective — its bite attack inflicts higher damage than fireballs once HP drops below key thresholds
  • Bring multiple top-tier tames (Beast of Desperation) to rotate during wipe phases
  • Manage cooldowns and buffs carefully between Corrupt and Clone waves
  • Ensure Degenerate Seal Armor is equipped

Survive both wipeout phases before committing to final assault. Once below 15% HP, focus burst damage — holding back risks another Corrupt wave.

docs.title: reaper-evolution
docs.text: Born through impregnation, Reapers progress via charge mechanics, tokens, and boss drops.

docs.title: Descended Reaper Prince/Princess
docs.text:
How to Obtain: Fight a Descended Reaper Queen (wild or summoned via War Generator). Drop her below 10% HP and she will impregnate the player.

If you have other dinos nearby for the Queen to aggro, she will usually ignore impregnation. Go in alone.

Result: After gestation, you give birth to a Reaper Prince or Princess (50/50 chance). Babies gain up to +75 bonus levels from kills while pregnant.

Birth in a confined area to claim quickly. Recommended mount: Descended Rock Drake with flame attack. Bring health & stimulant potions.

docs.title: Charge-Adapted Reaper
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Feed 100 Luminous Essence while a Glow/Lantern Pet is active (light ON)

How to Evolve: Place Essence in inventory, activate via radial menu

Result: Gains Charging Armor — a temporary shield requiring lantern pets to refresh

High-tier Reapers rely heavily on Charging Armor, making glow pets essential.

docs.title: Alpha Prince / Princess
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Kill a Charging Descended Reaper Queen to obtain the Queen's Luminous Token and unlock Mega Reaper Token engram

What "Charging" Means: A wild Queen with light buff applied — look for electricity effects sparking around its body

How to Evolve: Craft the Charged Mega Reaper Token and feed it to your Charge-Adapted Reaper

Result: Evolves into an Alpha Reaper, T3 equivalent

docs.title: Alpha King / Queen
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat the Mega Reaper (War Generator summon) to obtain a Crown

How to Evolve: Place Crown into Alpha Reaper's inventory — Prince + Crown = Alpha King, Princess + Crown = Alpha Queen

Result: Higher damage reduction, stronger offense, enhanced Charging Armor

docs.title: Primordial Reaper
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat a Primordial Reaper (War Generator summon) to obtain the evo item

How to Evolve: Sacrifice opposite genders (King + Queen) alongside Primordial Crystallization (crafted in Descended Smithy)

Result: Primordial Reaper, one of the strongest T4 creatures — capable of fighting T5-T6 bosses

docs.title: Warden Reaper
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat a Warden Reaper to obtain evo item and unlock engram

How to Evolve: Feed evo item to Primordial Reaper

Result: Warden Reaper, a major defensive powerhouse

docs.title: Supreme Warden Reaper
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Perform Descension on a Warchief, craft Evo Core using Descended Warchief Essence

How to Evolve: Feed Enhance Core to Warden Reaper

Result: Supreme Warden Reaper, the ultimate descension creature and pinnacle of the Reaper line

docs.title: ice-titan-evolution
docs.text: Three variants with significant power increases at each stage.

docs.title: Descended Ice Titan
docs.text:
How to Tame: Works like an Excellent Boss tame. Drop HP below 50% before torpor applies, then knock out with high-torpor weapons. Feed to tame.

Notes:

  • Can equip Advanced Excellent Boss Armor and Unreal Evo Cube
  • Excels at Beta Supply Drops

docs.title: Degenerate Ice Titan
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat a wild Degenerate Ice Titan (millions of HP) to obtain the Degenerate Ice Titan Head

Strategy: Use powerful Infected flyer (Infected Celestial Wyvern) with shield. Avoid freeze attack which can wipe tames.

Evolution: Craft Degenerate Titan Evo Core using the Head + late-game materials, consume in your Descended Titan's inventory

Result: Degenerate Ice Titan, T4 equivalent with HP scaling into millions

Kill Count Requirement: Must reach 1,000 kills (wild dinos +1, corrupted +2, T4 Ancients +10) before progressing

Notes: Excels at Alpha Supply Drops

docs.title: Flame / Lightning Ice Titan
docs.text:
Final Evolution: Once at 1,000 kills, craft the Final Evolution Coin (requires Legendary Dodorexy, Bionic Swords, rare mats). Feed to Degenerate Ice Titan.

Result: 50% chance to evolve into either Flame Ice Titan or Lightning Ice Titan — both are devastating siege tames

Notes: Excels at God Supply Drops

Each stage demands heavy preparation. Stockpile mats, bring backup tames, prepare freeze counters.

docs.title: Taming a Descended Managarmr
docs.text: Find and knock out a Descended Managarmr using Tranq Darts or Rifles. Tame with Excellent Kibble — no hunger potions required.

docs.title: Defeating the Degenerate Managarmr Boss
docs.text:
Summon via War Generator. Bring a strong T4 warfighter such as Infected Celestial Wyvern with Shield. Summon or kite to a tight spot to control jumping.

Rewards:

  • Degenerate Enhance Core (required for evolution)
  • High-tier armor pieces
  • Power potions

docs.title: Evolving to Degenerate Form
docs.text:
Feed the Degenerate Evolution Core to your Descended Managarmr.

The evolution resets level scaling to base but retains bred stats — maximize performance by fully breeding beforehand.

Result: Degenerate Managarmr capable of freezing entire battlefields

docs.title: Deeply Degenerate Managarmr
docs.text:
Crafted at Descend Smithy using Degenerate Icejumper Enhance Core.

Key Requirements:

  • Degenerate Corrupt Hearts
  • Warchief Souls (Chaos + Order)
  • Combat Tributes (Red, Blue, Green)
  • Spectral Element, Havoc Orbs, Unreal Essence, other T4+ materials

Result: Greatly enhanced Managarmr with invincibility frames, burst speed, and massive damage amplification

docs.title: legendary-evolution
docs.text:
Progresses from Alpha Dodorexy to Alpha Trex Ascend (T8).

Evolutions don't carry over stats but retain bred stat points. Breed for highest base stats before evolving.

docs.title: Alpha Dodorexy
docs.text:
How to Obtain: Found wild; KO tame by feeding Devilish or Divine Essence

Unique Drop: Killing has 50% chance to drop Little Dodorex Egg

Progression Requirement: Kill 25 wild Dodorexys

Result: Becomes Legendary Alpha DodoRexy with permanent damage and defense boost

Evolution resets level scaling but retains bred stats.

docs.title: Alpha Trex
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat the Legendary DodoRexy to unlock engram and gain Legendary Soul

How to Evolve: Use Legendary Soul with Evo Core on Legendary Alpha Dodorexy (must have completed 25 Dodorexy kills)

Result: Alpha Trex, T4 equivalent with access to Legendary Raid System. Through raid progression, scales to T6.

docs.title: Legendary DodoRexy Encounter
docs.text:
The Legendary DodoRexy unleashes devastating ranged fire. Stay in close range to prevent fire breath.

Use strongest T5+ tanky creatures (Primordial Reaper or Ancient Evo Giga).

Phase Two: At low health, transforms into stronger form with increased damage, speed, and resilience. Maintain pressure and manage healing.

Drops:

  • Ancient Legendary God Soul
  • 40+ Ancient Token Clusters (excellent farming substitute)
  • Random Warfare Keys

docs.title: Legendary Challenge System
docs.text: Keep Legendary Essence in your Alpha T-Rex's inventory to trigger Legendary Challenge buff (900s duration). Wild creatures within 6000 range can spawn as Stalkers (max 15). Killing Stalkers yields Stalker Dust and Legendary Materials.

docs.title: Extra Level-Ups via Legendary Essence
docs.text:
Ensure at least 5 Legendary Essence present for every Stalker kill. Stalkers gain health with each attack — avoid big attacks to limit regen.

Each kill converts 5 Essence into stat points (Health or Melee):

  • Raptor: +1
  • Carno: +2
  • Quetz: +3
  • Rex: +4
  • Wyvern: +5
  • Legendary Drake Boss: +10

Once Health and Melee both reach 254 points each, you're maxed out.

docs.title: Legendary Drake Stalker Boss
docs.text:
After defeating 30 Stalkers during active Legendary Challenge, the Legendary Drake Stalker Boss spawns.

Unique Drops:

  • Ascended Legendary Rex Tek Saddle engram
  • Legendary Rex Chibi (25% Def & Dmg bonus, recovers 50k HP/s — works only for Alpha Trex, upgrades Excellent Chibi)

docs.title: Alpha Trex Ascend
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat Legendary Drake Stalker Boss

How to Evolve: Equip Ascended Legendary Rex Tek Saddle on Alpha Trex with 254 Health and 254 Melee

Result: Alpha Trex Ascend, T8 power. Saddle is permanent — cannot be removed unless Rex dies.

docs.title: infected-evolution
docs.text:
Parallel aerial power path culminating in Infected Celestial Wyvern (T4).

Evolutions don't carry over stats but retain bred stat points. Breed for highest base stats before evolving.

All Infected creatures share the passive ability Infected Defensive, which has a chance to nullify incoming attacks.

docs.title: Infected Dimorph
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Summon the Infected Origin (Dimorph) via Descend Smithy

Result: Starter infected flyer, T2 entry level

docs.title: Infected Ptero
docs.text:
How to Evolve: Feed Evo Core for Infected Dimorph to your Dimorph

Result: Infected Ptero with improved aerial combat and mobility, T2 equivalent

docs.title: Infected Argentavis
docs.text:
How to Evolve: Feed Evo Core for Infected Ptero to your Ptero

Result: Infected Argentavis, high-tier T3 capable of handling bosses

Devilish Buff (Permanent Passive):

  • +50% Damage Resistance
  • +80% Damage Output

docs.title: Infected Celestial Wyvern
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat Infected Celestial Wyvern (War Generator) to obtain its Soul

How to Evolve: Feed Argent Evo Core (crafted with Soul and T4 materials) to your Argentavis

Result: Infected Celestial Wyvern, powerful T4 aerial apex for Element Guardians and beyond. Effective against most T5 bosses.

Celestial Buff (Activated Ability):

  • Massive Offensive Boost
  • Major Defensive Boost

docs.title: ancient-evolution
docs.text:
Progresses through multiple apex stages, culminating in Supreme Warden Giga.

Evolutions don't carry over stats but retain bred stat points. Breed for highest base stats before evolving.

docs.title: Ancient Raptor
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Summon Ancient Evo Origin (Raptor) via Descend Smithy

Result: Tamed Ancient Raptor, T2 entry level

docs.title: Ancient Carno
docs.text:
How to Evolve: Feed Evo Core (Original Raptor) to Ancient Raptor

Result: Ancient Carno, T2 with improved combat stats

docs.title: Ancient Theri
docs.text:
How to Evolve: Feed Evo Core (Ancient Carno) to Ancient Carno

Result: Ancient Theri, entry T3 requiring Devilish/Divine resources

docs.title: Ancient Spino
docs.text:
How to Evolve: Feed Evo Core (Ancient Theri) to Ancient Theri

Result: Ancient Spino, T4 equivalent with massive scaling

Strong T4 warfighter capable of taking on most Abyssal and Celestial Bosses.

docs.title: Ancient Evo Giga
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat Ancient Phantom (War Generator) to unlock Spino Evo Core Engram

How to Evolve: Craft Evo Core using Ancient Descended Gigant Soul (from Phantom) + Celestial Gigant Trophies (from Descended Celestial Gigant). Feed to Ancient Spino.

Result: Ancient Evo Giganotosaurus, T4 apex with Phantom Mode

Phantom Mode:

  • High Dodge Chance
  • ~70% Increased Damage Output
  • Massive HP Regeneration

docs.title: Understanding Phantom Mode
docs.text:
Phantom Mode drastically amplifies damage but has steep stamina tradeoff. Stamina drain scales with Melee investment — higher damage builds are more demanding.

Recommended Builds:

Burst Build (Boss Killer) — Melee 55-60, Stamina 20-25

Hybrid (Sustainable Damage) — Melee 45-50, Stamina 30-35

Endurance Build — Melee 35-40, Stamina 40-45

At 60 Melee, Phantom Mode deals 4-5x base damage but stamina drain exceeds 4,000/s — only ~5 seconds of uptime.

docs.title: Celestial Evo Giga
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Requires Celestial Giga sacrifice

How to Evolve: Bring Celestial Giga to Ancient Evo Giga and sacrifice it

Result: Celestial Evo Giganotosaurus, ultimate Ancient Line form, apex T4

Permanent Buffs:

  • Ancient Buff — Passive damage resistance
  • Celestial Buff — Permanent celestial power-up stacking with Ancient
  • Phantom Mode — Activated buff

docs.title: Warden Giga
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat Supreme Warden Giga to obtain Warden Giga Legacy Engram

How to Evolve: Craft Legacy at Descend Smithy, feed to Celestial Evo Giga

Result: Warden Giga with immense durability and superior scaling

docs.title: Supreme Warden Giga
docs.text:
How to Unlock: Defeat Dream (T8 Boss) and ascend any applicable Warchief to obtain Ascended Warchief Essence

How to Evolve: Craft Warden Giga Intensify Core at Descend Smithy, feed to Warden Giga

Result: Supreme Warden Giga, apex form of Ancient line — capable of challenging the Overseer

docs.title: supply-drops
docs.text: Supply Drops are craftable defense events that scale with your progression tier.

docs.title: How They Work
docs.text:
1. Activate the drop to begin a five-wave defense event
  2. Protect the beacon until all waves are cleared
  3. Loot becomes available after the final wave

Supply Drop attackers deal reduced damage to Degenerate, Unique Tek, and Purified Evolved dinos — making these best choices for defending.

Descended Ice Titans are exceptionally effective — massive AoE slam, high durability, and crowd-control.

docs.title: Beta Supply Drop
docs.text:
Use: Descended Managarmr/Ice Titan, Unique Tek, or Purified Unreal-Divine/Devilish dinos

Drops: T3 Saddles, Corruption Ancient Magic Box, Ancient Token Clusters, Boss Orbs, Combat Essence, Degenerate Corrupt Hearts, T3 Essence Souls

docs.title: Alpha Supply Drop
docs.text:
Use: Degenerate Managarmr, Ice Titan, Enforcer "Holy," Mek, or T4 Purified dinos

Drops: T4 Saddles, Corruption Ancient Magic Box, Ancient Token Clusters, Boss Orbs, Combat Essence, T4 Energy, Degenerate Corrupt Hearts

docs.title: God Supply Drops
docs.text:
Use: Flame or Lightning imbued Degenerate Ice Titan

Drops: Warfare Keys, Corruption Ancient Magic Box, Ancient Token Clusters, Bionic Souls, Warchief Souls, Degenerate Corrupt Hearts

docs.title: loot-bosses
docs.text: Boss encounters with valuable progression drops.

docs.title: T1 Loot Boss
docs.text:
Drops: Artifacts, Vegetables, Sweet Veggie Cakes

Great early boss for artifact and kibble-crafting supplies.

docs.title: Unreal Loot Guardian
docs.text:
Drops: Blueprints, Artifacts, Apex Drop Jar (Combat Boss Trophies)

Drops core progression materials for Combat Bosses.

docs.title: Resource Boss (Extinction)
docs.text:
Drops: Condensed Gas, Corrupted Nodule, Corrupted Wood, Element, Element Dust, Silicate, Red Crystallized Sap, Fragmented Green Gems, Excellent Soul

Excellent for mass Element and corrupted materials. Harvest corpse for Black Pearls and Sweet Veggie Cakes.

docs.title: Resource Boss (Aberration)
docs.text:
Drops: Blue Gems, Red Gems, Green Gems, Fungal Wood, Congealed Gas Balls, Element, Element Ore, Excellent Soul

Excellent for gem-based resources and Element Ore. Harvest corpse for Black Pearls and Sweet Veggie Cakes.

docs.title: Resource Boss (Scorched Earth)
docs.text:
Drops: Clay, Raw Salt, Sand, Silk, Sulfur, Element, Excellent Soul

Best source of desert materials. Harvest corpse for Black Pearls and Sweet Veggie Cakes.

docs.title: Descended Artifact Boss
docs.text:
Drops: Artifacts, Blueprints (including Advanced Tranq Pike, Descended Fabricated Sniper Rifle), Veggies

Premier option for farming artifacts.

docs.title: passive-production
docs.text: Creatures with special abilities and passive production.

docs.title: Essence Producers
docs.text:
Descended Dodo — Descended Essence + Silica Pearls. Easiest starter producer.

Descended Lightpets — Descended Essence + Silica Pearls + Luminous Essence. Keep light on to extract.

Excellent Dodo — Excellent Essence + Rare Flowers. Boss tame reward.

Little Dodo — Element + Black Pearls. Requires T6 crafting (Bionic Soul).

Little Dodo-Rex — Devilish Soul + Divine Soul + Legendary Essence. Late-game hybrid producer.

docs.title: Resource Gatherers
docs.text:
Miner Anky — Auto-smelts metal in inventory. 5x metal harvesting.

Logger Castoroides — 5x wood harvesting.

Descended Pelagornis — Organic Polymer from kills based on dino size.

Pearl Diver Angler — Black Pearls + Silica Pearls from fish/aquatic creatures.

Descended Pachy — Can harvest metal.

docs.title: Utility Producers
docs.text:
Descended Bob (Phiomia) — Poop, Descended Essence + Descended Milk. Forces nearby dinos to poop every 1-2 min.

Bob Dodo — Resource Collection. Pulls from nearby producers (excluding Biotoxin/Luminous).

Descended Biotoxin Bug — Biotoxin for tranq ammo.

Producer Achatina — Cementing Paste.

Descended Beehive — Giant Bee Honey + Rare Flowers. Crafted structure.

Descended Otter — Auto-collects Boss Artifacts you can't carry. Set to wandering.

Descended Phoenix — Cooked Meat + Black Pearls. Auto-cooks raw meat, passively poops pearls.

docs.title: How to Get Luminous Essence
docs.text:
Method 1 — Kill Glow Pets: Slow beginner method. Kill wild glow pets (Bulbdog, etc.) for Luminous Essence and Gems.

Method 2 — Tame Glow Pets (Recommended): After taming, turn on the glow pet via radial menu. Select "Extract Luminous Essence" — extraction rate is 1 Essence per 100 Charge stored.

Reapers need lantern pets to fuel Charging Armor. Always keep one active on your shoulder.

docs.title: Descended DodoWyvern
docs.text: Requires Excellent Kibble, Grapples + Crossbow. Grapple onto it in open airspace, wait for "Feed Kibble" prompt, feed once then again when prompted. Can swap between Flame, Lightning, and Poison breaths (Ctrl on PC).

docs.title: Descended Rock Drake
docs.text: Summon Rock Drake Emperor via War Generator. Requires 500 Descended Essence, 300 Excellent Essence, 2 Generic Artifacts, 10 Excellent Souls, 25 Rock Drake Feathers. Defeat with Descended DodoWyvern. Loot Fertilized Descended Rock Drake Egg from floor.

docs.title: Ghost Evolutions
docs.text:
Excellent Bosses with elemental variants (Lightning, Poison, Flame) can evolve into Ghost forms after defeating Sin of Element.

Available Evolutions:

  • Ghost Dodorexy
  • Ghost Wyvern
  • Ghost Drake

To Evolve: Apply Ghost Cores (dropped from Sin of Element) to Lightning, Poison, or Flame variants. Transforms them into Ghost forms with combined triple-element breath attack.

WARNING: Ghost Evolutions lose their ability to apply torpor.

Ghost Evolutions deal increased damage against the Oracle Boss.

docs.title: Poison Evolutions
docs.text:
Certain Excellent Boss creatures — Poison DodoRexy, Poison Wyvern, Poison Rock Drake — can evolve into powerful forms.

To Evolve: Feed respective Evo Core (Poison). Requires up to T4 materials including Ascended Poison Drake's Soul (from defeating Ascended Poison Drake via War Generator).

These evolutions boost damage and resistance, making them top-tier for knockouts.

docs.text: All stats based on Level 150 unboosted creatures — no server multipliers or custom imprints. Assumes working knowledge of basic ARK mechanics.

docs.text: Elite | Savage | Toxic | Berserk | Necrotic | Grenadier | Prime | Nuclear/Vampiric | Wardens | Hellfire | DarkGod | Corrupted Darkgods | Spectral Wardens

docs.title: getting-started
docs.text: Coming soon

docs.title: baseline
docs.text: All stats based on Level 300 unboosted creatures — no server multipliers or custom imprints. Assumes working knowledge of basic ARK mechanics.

docs.title: overview
docs.text:
Cataclysm is a dino overhaul mod with influence from classic ARK dino mods. An apocalypse has overtaken the ARK, forcing only the strongest creatures to survive and thrive. This kibble and tier-based overhaul involves killing and breeding for resources.

The mod starts off moderately difficult — dodos won't hunt you down, making it a great first kibble tamer overhaul. But later tiers become much harder and more of a grind.

Key Features:

  • 285+ dinos currently in the mod with 300+ more planned
  • Tiered progression from T1 (Runt) to T14 (Ascended)
  • Boss gates every 4 tiers unlock the next phase
  • Fluid-based crafting system replaces traditional poop mechanics
  • Supports all latest DLC creatures

docs.title: Tiered Progression
docs.text: Progress by taming creatures one tier at a time, each requiring crafted kibble.

docs.title: Fluid System
docs.text:
Tamed dinos produce "fluids" instead of poop, which are essential for crafting kibble for the next tier.

WARNING: Fluids only generate if Cataclysm Dino poop is enabled. If using Dino Depot Terminal, ensure poop generation is ON.

docs.title: Resource-Locked Taming
docs.text:
You must farm fluids from tamed dinos and collect pearls from wild ones to craft kibble for the next tier.

Example: To tame a Tidal Rex, kill a Tidal Trike for its pearl, craft Tidal Kibble, then tame the Tidal Rex.

docs.title: Boss Gates
docs.text:
Every 4 tiers introduces a boss fight that unlocks the next phase of progression through resources:

  • T4 Cyclonic — Unlocks Glacial Kibble materials
  • T8 Maelstrom — Unlocks Sumerian Kibble materials
  • T12 Watcher — Unlocks Atlantean Kibble materials (Coming Soon)

docs.title: Level Requirements
docs.text: Level 109 required for Tiers 10+. Use Chibi creatures to achieve level 109. Alpha creatures called "Alpha Rex - Avatar" have been added to help with leveling.

docs.title: Starter Phase (Tier 1 Runt)
docs.text:
1. Play normal ARK — build a small shack, gather basic resources
  2. Kill Runt Dinos on foot
  3. Tame Runt Dino using vanilla mechanics
  4. Use Runt Dino to kill Tidal Dinos and collect Tidal Pearls

Runt creatures have 1.5x damage and vanilla health — manageable for early game.

docs.title: Taming Tidal Creatures
docs.text:
Craft in Player Inventory:

  • Tame Helper — speeds up knockout taming
  • Compound Bow (Level 30) — special Cataclysm bow
  • Arrow 30k — deals 30,000 torpor per hit
  • Tidal Kibble — requires Tidal Pearls + Runt Fluids

Progression:

  1. Craft Tidal Kibble from collected pearls and farmed fluids
  2. Tame Tidal Dinos with knockout + kibble
  3. Kill Tidal and Rapid Dinos for loot
  4. Set up Tidal Dino farm for Tidal Fluids

Tidal creatures have 2.5x damage and 2x health.

docs.title: Taming Rapid Creatures
docs.text:
Craft:

  • Rapid Kibble — requires Rapid Pearls + Tidal Fluids
  • Arrow 100k — deals 100,000 torpor per hit

Progression:

  1. Kill Rapid creatures for Rapid Pearls
  2. Farm Tidal Fluids from your tamed Tidal dinos
  3. Craft Rapid Kibble and tame Rapid creatures
  4. Set up Rapid Fluid farm for next tier

Rapid creatures have 5x damage and 3x health.

docs.title: tier-3-5-avatar
docs.text: Avatars are dinos that remove the player while riding — you become the dino. They function like normal dinos with dino balls, but when you ride them, you play as the creature.

docs.title: Taming Avatar
docs.text:
1. Kill Featherlight Avatar and collect Avatar Dust
  2. Craft Avatar Kibble
  3. Tame Featherlight Avatar
  4. Set up Featherlight Avatar Essence farm

Avatar progression from Runt to Ascended is planned. Currently only Runt Featherlight Avatar is available.

docs.title: tier-4-cyclonic-boss
docs.text: The first major boss gate. Defeating Cyclonic bosses unlocks materials needed for Glacial Kibble (Tier 5).

docs.title: Boss Fight
docs.text:
1. Craft Cyclonic Boss Summon in player inventory (search "Boss")
  2. Consume the Cyclonic Boss token
  3. Defeat Cyclonic Boss (Gorilla)
  4. Receive Tameable Cyclonic Boss Token in inventory
  5. Consume token to summon tameable boss

docs.title: Boss Tames
docs.text:
Repeat kills to craft all 12 Tameable Bosses, or farm until you have Watcher and Shield Fragment farms going.

Available Cyclonic Tames:

  • Cyclonic Basilisk
  • Cyclonic Basilosaurus
  • Cyclonic DodoRexy
  • Cyclonic Dragon
  • Cyclonic Gigant
  • Cyclonic Griffin
  • Cyclonic Raptor
  • Cyclonic Rex
  • Cyclonic Rhynio
  • Cyclonic Rock Drake
  • Cyclonic Rock Golem
  • Cyclonic Spider

Search "Cyclonic" in your inventory to see craftable boss tames.

docs.title: Taming Glacial Creatures
docs.text:
Requirements:

  • Watcher Fragments — from Cyclonic Boss kills
  • Shield Fragments — from Cyclonic Boss kills
  • Glacial Pearls — kill wild Glacial creatures

Craft: Glacial Kibble

Progression:

  1. Farm boss resources from Cyclonic kills
  2. Kill Glacial creatures for pearls
  3. Craft Glacial Kibble
  4. Tame Glacial creatures

Glacial creatures have 10x damage and 6x health.

docs.title: Taming Undead Creatures
docs.text:
Requirements:

  • Glacial Fluids — from tamed Glacial dinos
  • Undead Pearls — kill wild Undead creatures

Craft:

  • Undead Kibble
  • Arrow 500k — deals 500,000 torpor per hit

Progression:

  1. Farm Glacial Fluids
  2. Kill Undead creatures for pearls
  3. Craft Undead Kibble and tame Undead creatures
  4. Set up Undead Fluid farm

Undead creatures have 15x damage and 8x health.

docs.title: Taming Soaring Creatures
docs.text:
Requirements:

  • Undead Fluids — from tamed Undead dinos
  • Soaring Pearls — kill wild Soaring creatures

Craft: Soaring Kibble

Progression:

  1. Farm Soaring Pearls from kills
  2. Craft Soaring Kibble
  3. Tame Soaring creatures
  4. Farm Soaring Fluids for next tier

Soaring creatures have 18x damage and 10x health.

docs.title: tier-8-maelstrom-boss
docs.text: The second major boss gate. Defeating Maelstrom bosses unlocks Ancient and Futuristic Fragments needed for Sumerian Kibble.

docs.title: Boss Fight
docs.text:
1. Craft Maelstrom Boss in player inventory
  2. Consume Maelstrom Boss token
  3. Defeat the boss
  4. Craft Maelstrom Boss Tame tokens

docs.title: Boss Tames
docs.text:
Craft different tame tokens until you can farm Ancient and Futuristic Fragments efficiently.

Available Maelstrom Tames:

  • Maelstrom Argent
  • Maelstrom Boss Ankylo
  • Maelstrom Boss DodoRex
  • Maelstrom Boss Golem
  • Maelstrom Carcha
  • Maelstrom Direbear
  • Maelstrom Direwolf
  • Maelstrom Dragon
  • Maelstrom Forest Kaiju
  • Maelstrom Gigant
  • Maelstrom Griffin
  • Maelstrom Kaiju

  • Maelstrom Raptor

docs.title: Taming Sumerian Creatures
docs.text:
Requirements:

  • Ancient Fragments — from Maelstrom Boss kills
  • Futuristic Fragments — from Maelstrom Boss kills
  • Sumerian Pearls — kill wild Sumerian creatures
  • Intelligent Goo — from wild Sumerian kills

Craft:

  • Artificial Cores — intermediate crafting material
  • Sumerian Kibble — requires Artificial Cores

Progression:

  1. Defeat wild Sumerian creatures for Pearls and Intelligent Goo
  2. Craft Artificial Cores for Sumerian Kibble
  3. Craft Sumerian Kibble
  4. Tame Sumerian creatures
  5. Farm Sumerian Fluids for Tier 10

Sumerian creatures have 25x damage and 25x health.

docs.title: Taming Tsunami Creatures
docs.text:
Requirements:

  • Sumerian Fluids — from tamed Sumerian dinos
  • Tsunami Pearls — kill wild Tsunami creatures
  • Genetic Paste — from wild Tsunami kills

Craft:

  • Genetic Codex — intermediate crafting material
  • Tsunami Kibble — requires Genetic Codex

New Resources (Tier 10):

  • Tsunami Scales
  • Tsunami Fur
  • Tsunami Hide
  • Tsunami Feathers

Craft: Tsunami Saddles (Coming Soon)

Tsunami creatures have 30x damage and 30x health.

docs.title: loot-dinos
docs.text: Special creatures that drop valuable loot when killed.

docs.title: Treasure Goat
docs.text: Drops good ARK loot — armor, weapons, hard-to-gather resources.

docs.title: Treasure Stag
docs.text: Drops Cataclysm loot — weapons, tranqs, bows, potions, summon tokens. Also drops the Tranq Pike.

docs.title: Resource Otter
docs.text: Drops Fish, Prime Fish, Cementing Paste, Polymer, Pearls, Blood.

docs.text:

Tranq Pike — Unlimited use tranq pike. Drops from Treasure Stag.

docs.title: Ranged Tranqs
docs.text:
Compound Bow — Special Cataclysm bow, crafted at level 30.

Arrow Type Level Torpor Arrow 30k 30 30,000 Arrow 100k 50 100,000 Arrow 500k 60 500,000 Arrow 1M 105 1,000,000

docs.title: Weapons
docs.text: Cataclysm Pickaxe — Custom pickaxe with high harvest rates.

docs.title: Potions
docs.text:

Health Potion — Heals you and your dino to 100% from your hotbar.

docs.title: dino-depot-setup
docs.text:
If using Dino Depot Terminal, log in as Admin and open the Mod Configuration wheel menu.

Required Settings (Structures Tab):

  • Poop Production Enabled: Yes
  • Poop Interval: 60-180 (recommended)
  • Poop Chance: 1 (whole number, not decimal)
  • Poop Limit: 10,000+ (Cataclysm resources stack)
  • Poop generation requires power: No

Use a dedicated terminal for Cataclysm Dinos to prevent mixing with other dinos.

docs.title: spoil-settings
docs.text: Set spoil multiplier to 1 or higher — do not make spoil time faster than 1, otherwise players will report fluids and fragments spoiling too fast.

docs.title: mod-compatibility
docs.text: WARNING: Do not run all of these mods. This is just a suggestion of compatible mods.

docs.title: Highly Recommended
docs.text:
• Death Inventory Keeper or Icemods Reborn — Inventory recovery on death
  • Dino Depot — Most compatible dino storage mod
  • GDG Toolz Reloaded — QOL items, ground collectors for kibble grinding

docs.title: Compatible Mods
docs.text:
• GDG Seedz Galore
  • Awesome Spy Glass
  • Awesome Teleporter / Omega Teleporter
  • Awesome Admin Tools
  • Der Dino Finder
  • Super Cryo Storage (some bosses/corrupted cannot be balled)
  • Shiny Ascended
  • Vanilla with Sprinkles
  • Cyber Structures
  • Stacking Mods

docs.title: Special Notes
docs.text:
Other Overhauls: Put Cataclysm 2.0 first in mod order, otherwise only partial spawns may occur.

Omega Lite: Turn kibble off in admin menu. Do NOT use on first playthrough.

Insane Everything: Use with CAUTION. Do NOT use on first playthrough.

docs.title: faq
docs.text:
How do I craft kibble? Farm fluids from tamed dinos of the previous tier and collect pearls from wild dinos of the target tier. Combine in player inventory.

Why aren't fluids generating? Ensure Cataclysm Dino poop is enabled. If using Dino Depot, check poop production settings.

What are Avatars? Dinos that let you play as the creature instead of riding it. Currently only Runt Featherlight Avatar is available.

Can I craft dinos? Some elusive dinos like Phoenix must be crafted, not tamed wild. Runt Phoenix and Runt Xenomorph are craftable (tier-up not yet available).

What are Loot Creatures? Treasure Goat, Treasure Stag, Resource Goat, Resource Otter, and Artifact Queen Bee drop valuable items.

How do I reach level 109 for T10+? Use Chibi creatures. Alpha Rex - Avatar creatures have been added to help with leveling.
